case_title: 50 GOLDEN GATE APARTMENTS VS. ERIC TRIFILO et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY TRIAL AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT TRIFILO, ERIC
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE SETTLED OFF THE RECORD. JUDGE PRO TEM IRVING PFEFFER; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (218/206).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 50 GOLDEN GATE APARTMENTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRIFILO, ERIC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 50 GOLDEN GATE AVENUE, #210, SAN FRANCISCO $3,786.70 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,786.70, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY SANCHEZ, ANDRES

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT ERIC TRIFILO'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED. REQUIREMENTS OF CCP 473.5 ARE NOT MET GIVEN DEFENDANT'S GENERAL APPEARANCE AND MOTION NOT FILED WITHIN A REASONABLE TIME. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-11-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jason Palm of VLSP, 420-2147, appearing for defendant and moving party
Andres Sanchez, 283-4764, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ERIC TRIFILO'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is denied. Requirements of CCP 473.5 are not met given defendant's general appearance and motion not filed within a reasonable time. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-09-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ANDRES SANCHEZ, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF; LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY ANN KIM, Esq. APPEARS FOR DEFENDANT ERIC TRIFILO WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; PARTIES ENTER INTO A SIGNED AGREEMENT WHICH IS FILED. SETTLE-
MENT TERMS CONTAINED IN THE SIGNED AGREEMENT FOR PREMISES LOCATED AT 50 GOLDEN GATE AVENUE, #210, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

JUDGE PRO TEM IRVING PFEFFER; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (218/206).
